calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: July 5, 2006, Judge Pro Tem Richard Beckman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals, Respondent Sheng Kun Su appears in Pro Per, Appellant Shak Cheong Li appears in Pro Per. Ken Chen appears as a witness for appellant; Wan Ling Li appears as a witness for respondent. Also present is Timothy Chen, interpreter of Chinese into English and English into Chinese, for the respondent and his witness
11:30am
Parties testify in the narrative and then Judge Beckman questions parties.
12:20pm
The Court retains evidence previously admitted, but does not identify or admit any new evidence. Mr. Shak Cheong Li and Mr Sheng Kun Su are given 3 weeks - until 7/26/05 - to provide the court with new evidence. Matter is submitted until then.
